name: Special To Movie
description: Automatically detects TV specials that are also standalone movies, creates hard links in your movie library, and syncs watch status bidirectionally.
overview: Detects TV specials that are also movies, creates hard links, and syncs watch status.

versions.changelog: Fix hard link failure on long file paths (Win32 MAX_PATH limit). Rename plugin display name to Special To Movie.
Use TMDB alternative titles when no localized title exists to avoid non-English folder names. Add Source column and filter to Linked Pairs table showing plugin-created vs pre-existing movies.

Fix missed movie detection for TVDB specials tagged as movies via Special Category when linkedMovie is not set. Enrich tag-based matches with TMDB metadata. Fix TMDB lookup skipping episodes without their own TMDB provider ID.
Fix watch status not syncing for existing paired items during full scan. TV special watch state now always takes priority unless only the movie has progress.
